title: MOBILE MEDICAL CLINIC - 211info
text: ROSEBURG MOBILE MEDICAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a mobile health van with services such as: -Treatment for acute conditions (e.g., minor infections, injuries, respiratory illnesses) -Testing for urinary infections, strep throat, flu, and COVID-19 -Basic wound care, including debridement, incision, and drainage procedures -Chronic Condition Management -Support for diabetes, high blood pressure, and other long-term health concerns -Medication management and lab test orders -Pelvic exams, Pap smears, and skin biopsies -Toenail procedures and cerumen (earwax) removal 621 W Madrone Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday 10am-2pm: Roseburg Dream Center 2555 NE Diamond Lake Boulvard, Roseburg, OR 97470 1st Thursday of the month 10am-2pm: Roseburg Department of Human Services 738 West Harvard Avenue Roseburg, OR 97470 2nd, 3rd, and 4th Thursday of the month noon-3pm: Adapt Opioid Treatment Program 406 NE Winchester Street Roseburg, OR 97470 (541) 440-3500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 440-3500 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, appoitments are encouraged FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Douglas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Mobile Health Care Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PSYCHIATRIC SERVICES SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - FAMILY AND BEHAVIORAL MEDICINE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROSEBURG
